title: Holland Road Massacre: The Legend of Pigman
original_title: Holland Road Massacre: The Legend of Pigman
overview: A horror film about an urban legend that comes to life; a masked manic, dubbed Pigman, stalks a pair of unlikely strangers in a bloody game of cat and mouse that can only end in brutal bloodshed.
